name: MaxKB
tagline: Open-source platform for building enterprise-grade AI agents and knowledge bases
seoTitle: MaxKB: Open-Source Enterprise Agent & RAG Platform
metaDescription: MaxKB is an open-source platform for building enterprise-grade agents. It combines RAG pipelines, workflows, and MCP tool-use, and runs from a single Docker container.
overview: MaxKB (short for Max Knowledge Brain) is an open-source platform for building enterprise-grade AI agents. It brings together Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines, a workflow engine, and MCP tool-use so teams can build smart assistants without writing much code.

The platform is model-agnostic. It works with private models like DeepSeek, Llama, and Qwen, as well as public ones like OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, and MiniMax. It also natively handles text, image, audio, and video, and is commonly used for customer service, internal knowledge bases, research, and education.
features: RAG pipeline that uploads documents or crawls online pages, then splits and vectorizes the text to cut down on model hallucinations
Agentic workflow engine with a function library and MCP tool-use for orchestrating complex business processes
Seamless, zero-coding integration into third-party systems to add Q&A capabilities to existing software
Model-agnostic support for private models (DeepSeek, Llama, Qwen) and public ones (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, MiniMax)
Native multi-modal support for text, image, audio, and video input and output

gettingStarted.intro: MaxKB ships as a Docker image, so the fastest way to start is to run a single container and open the web interface in your browser.

steps.heading: Start MaxKB with Docker
steps.body: Run the container, mapping port 8080 and mounting a local volume so your data persists between restarts.

steps.heading: Open the web interface
steps.body: Visit http://your_server_ip:8080 in your browser and log in with the default admin credentials: username admin and password MaxKB@123.. (change the password after your first login).

useCases: Run an intelligent customer-service assistant that answers questions from your own documents
Build a corporate internal knowledge base with smart, grounded Q&A
Support academic research and education with a document-aware AI agent
Add zero-coding Q&A capabilities to an existing third-party business system
